transcript: Retire. You are too good looking to retire. Well, well. If it isn't Puss in Boots himself. In the flesh. Uh, hey. There's the famous hat, the feather, and of course, the boots. But no one's escaped me yet. All right, let's get it over with. Fear me, if you dare. Okay, no more messing around. Slow, sloppy. You're not living up to the legend, Gato. ¡Gato! I just love the smell of fear. what's the matter lives flashing before your eyes pick it up pick it up Get out. Go, go, go! You know what? But you're not laughing now. You are no bounty hunter. You are death. And I don't mean it metaphorically, or rhetorically, or poetically, or theoretically, or in any other fancy way. I'm death. Straight up. And I've come for you, Luxembourg. But I'm still alive. He's here for me. Come on! I've enjoyed the chase, Gato. But I think we've reached the end now, you and I.
